summary: Completed testing of P0 features: (1) Notifications on inbound messages - WORKING, (2) Unsaved changes guard - WORKING. Fixed a bug where unassigned ticket message notifications didn't include message preview.
passed_tests: P0-1: Requester message on unassigned ticket notifies admins
P0-1: Requester message on assigned ticket notifies resolver (editor)
P0-1: Notification contains message preview (first 50 chars)
P0-1: Long messages are truncated with ellipsis in notification
P0-1: Notification bell icon visible in header
P0-1: Notification dropdown shows notifications with View links
P0-2: Users page - Add User dialog shows unsaved changes warning
P0-2: Categories page - Create Category dialog shows unsaved changes warning
P0-2: Announcements page - Shows 'You have unsaved changes' text when modified
P0-2: Announcements page - beforeunload event handler set up
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed unassigned ticket notification to include message preview
seed_data_creation: Created test data: Test Editor P0 (testeditor-p0@test.com), multiple TEST_P0_Notification_Order tickets
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 features verified working. Message notifications work for both assigned and unassigned tickets. Unsaved changes guard implemented on Users, Categories, and Announcements pages using hasFormChanges state and AlertDialog component. Test credentials: admin@redribbonops.com / Fmtvvl171**, testrequester@test.com / Test123!, testeditor-p0@test.com / Test123!

mocked_apis.SMTP_email_notifications: MOCKED - Email notifications logged to console instead of sent via SMTP

P0-1_message_notifications.requester_to_resolver: WORKING - When requester sends message, resolver gets notification with message preview
P0-1_message_notifications.requester_to_admin_unassigned: WORKING - When no resolver assigned, admins get notified with message preview
P0-1_message_notifications.resolver_to_requester: WORKING - When resolver sends message, requester gets notification
P0-1_message_notifications.notification_bell_icon: WORKING - Bell icon in header shows unread count badge
P0-1_message_notifications.notification_dropdown: WORKING - Shows notifications with title, message preview, timestamp, and View link
P0-1_message_notifications.notification_contains_preview: WORKING - Notification includes first 50 chars of message with ellipsis if truncated

P0-2_unsaved_changes_guard.users_page: WORKING - Add/Edit User dialog shows AlertDialog warning when closing with unsaved changes
P0-2_unsaved_changes_guard.categories_page: WORKING - Create/Edit Category dialog shows AlertDialog warning when closing with unsaved changes
P0-2_unsaved_changes_guard.announcements_page: WORKING - Shows 'You have unsaved changes' text and beforeunload event handler
P0-2_unsaved_changes_guard.stay_button: WORKING - Clicking Stay keeps dialog open
P0-2_unsaved_changes_guard.leave_button: WORKING - Clicking Leave without saving closes dialog and discards changes

bug_fixed.description: Fixed notification message for unassigned tickets to include message preview
bug_fixed.before: f"{current_user['name']} sent a message on unassigned ticket {order['order_code']}"
bug_fixed.after: f"{current_user['name']} sent a message on unassigned ticket {order['order_code']}: \"{message_data.message_body[:50]}{'...' if len(message_data.message_body) > 50 else ''}\""
